title: varronia subtruncata
intro: Varronia subtruncata, also known as the African teak or varronia, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, and the Caribbean. The medicinal properties of Varronia subtruncata include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, among other benefits. Varronia subtruncata can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
